step_rationale: Fatty acid synthesis enzyme; elevated ACC1 activity drives lipogenesis and inflammatory lipid mediators.
mechanism: ACC1 catalyzes malonyl-CoA synthesis, promoting fatty acid and inflammatory lipid production in plaque macrophages.

references.title: Elevated-GlcNAcylation enhances pro-inflammatory Th17 function by altering the intracellular lipid microenvironment.
